page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7nex.8xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage and utilizing a KVM hypervisor. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 40 Gbps.

The processor includes advanced instruction sets such as AVX, AVX-512 Foundation, and AVX-512 Vector Neural Network Instructions (VNNI), alongside hardware-accelerated cryptography features like AES, VAES, and SHA extensions. In benchmark testing, the instance demonstrates solid compute capabilities, achieving a stress-ng single-core CPU score of 1854.09 and a multi-core score of 31066.87. PassMark CPU testing yields a score of 36747.88, with the extended instructions test scoring 28353.9 and the encryption test reaching 29298.2.

Memory performance is characterized by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 1675.96 GB/sec, which drops to 154.46 GB/sec for large uncached blocks, and a write bandwidth of 67.93 GB/sec. The instance handles data processing efficiently, showing a single-threaded gzip compression speed of 28.16 GB/sec and a multi-threaded bzip3 decompression speed of 161.88 GB/sec. For application workloads, it achieves 31.02 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks and a static web serving throughput of 32.08 GB/sec.

Given its high compute-to-memory ratio and lack of local storage, this instance is highly cost-efficient for compute-heavy workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local NVMe drives. It is well-suited for high-throughput web serving, batch processing, cryptography tasks, and distributed compute workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7nex.8xlarge is a compute-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. Equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM (2.0 GB per core) and a KVM hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 40 Gbps. The processor supports AVX-512 and cryptographic acceleration, enabling strong performance in benchmarks with a PassMark CPU score of 36747.88 and a multi-core stress-ng score of 31066.87. Memory bandwidth reaches 1675.96 GB/sec for cached small blocks. In application tests, the server handles 31.02 million Redis SET operations per second and 32.08 GB/sec of static web serving throughput. This hardware profile is optimized for compute-intensive workloads, including high-throughput web serving, data compression, cryptography, and batch processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7nex.8xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and 40 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-throughput web serving and batch processing.

tagline: A dedicated thirty-two core compute-optimized instance featuring high network bandwidth and advanced vector instructions for intensive processing workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
40 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Supports AVX-512 and hardware-accelerated cryptography instructions
Delivers 32.08 GB/sec static web serving throughput and 31.02 million Redis SET operations per second
Optimized for compute-heavy workloads, batch processing, and cryptography
